description:
638 likes, 2 comments - floorballfrenzy on May 3, 2026: "Stop panicking when the attacker runs at you.

Defending gets 10x easier when you stay calm, protect the slot, and win the first step.

Swipe through, save this for your next game, and send it to a teammate who needs more confidence in defense 👀

#floorball #floorballtraining #floorballplayer #defensetips #innebandy".
